query:
INSERT INTO presets (name, description, intervals_data, rounds, createdAt) VALUES
(
  'Tabata',
  '20 seconds work, 10 seconds rest - 8 rounds for maximum intensity',
  JSON_ARRAY(
    JSON_OBJECT('duration', 20, 'sound', 'bell', 'color', '#ef4444'),
    JSON_OBJECT('duration', 10, 'sound', 'beep', 'color', '#10b981')
  ),
  8,
  NOW()
),
(
  'HIIT',
  '30 seconds high intensity, 30 seconds recovery - 10 rounds',
  JSON_ARRAY(
    JSON_OBJECT('duration', 30, 'sound', 'bell', 'color', '#f97316'),
    JSON_OBJECT('duration', 30, 'sound', 'beep', 'color', '#06b6d4')
  ),
  10,
  NOW()
),
(
  'Pomodoro',
  '25 minutes focused work, 5 minutes break - 4 rounds',
  JSON_ARRAY(
    JSON_OBJECT('duration', 1500, 'sound', 'ding', 'color', '#8b5cf6'),
    JSON_OBJECT('duration', 300, 'sound', 'chime', 'color', '#10b981')
  ),
  4,
  NOW()
),
(
  'Warm-up',
  '5 minutes light cardio, 5 minutes dynamic stretching',
  JSON_ARRAY(
    JSON_OBJECT('duration', 300, 'sound', 'bell', 'color', '#3b82f6'),
    JSON_OBJECT('duration', 300, 'sound', 'beep', 'color', '#f59e0b')
  ),
  1,
  NOW()
),
(
  'Cool-down',
  '5 minutes walking, 10 minutes static stretching',
  JSON_ARRAY(
    JSON_OBJECT('duration', 300, 'sound', 'bell', 'color', '#06b6d4'),
    JSON_OBJECT('duration', 600, 'sound', 'chime', 'color', '#84cc16')
  ),
  1,
  NOW()
);
